title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Amazon-UK Limited
body: "Application number 3001  Applicant Amazon Europe Core S.À.R.L objected to the name used by Amazon-UK Limited  under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 10th August 2020, the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Amazon-UK Limited is changed to 12022722 Ltd. "
